TextENGNew: ``...We came here all fired up, but man, they're making us wait.``
changeReason: Old only says 'How long are they going to make us wait?' while new captures the full JPN meaning of arriving enthusiastic but being kept waiting (意気込んできたのはいいものの).

TextENGNew: ``Those people seem to be free. They should let us talk to them.``
``Those are just general office workers.@k@vS12/03/180300328. We have to talk to the actual social worker responsible for the case.``
``I wonder if they're busy because they have a lot of cases like this...``
``I don't know.@k@vS12/03/180300330. ...I wish they didn't have so many issues to deal with.``
...Certainly, when the family counseling business is thriving, something has gone deeply wrong with the world.
After about thirty minutes of waiting, my name was finally called.
Since Mion couldn't use the Sonozaki family name, I'd been the one to fill out the consultation form at reception.
changeReason: Old says 'wrote down my name at the registration' (vague) while new says 'fill out the consultation form at reception,' matching JPN 受付に相談票を書いた (wrote the consultation form).

TextENGNew: ``I'm Maebara... My name was called...``
I went to the receptionist to find a uniformed older lady.
...She must be one of the office workers Mion mentioned.@k Was she really going to be the one dealing with us?
``Hello, Maebara-san.@k@vS12/00/jimuA18002. I see you're here with four other friends... How can I help you today?``
The only thing I wrote on the registration was that I wanted to talk about Satoko Houjou.
``Well, we're here to talk about Satoko Houjou's case. Chie-sensei from the Hinamizawa Branch School called and made a report yesterday.@k@vS12/01/180100655. We would like to discuss the case.``
``Are you her friends?``
``Yes.@k@vS12/01/180100657. We're her classmates.``
``I see.@k@vS12/00/jimuA18006. Please wait a few more minutes.``
That was it from her, then.
A real social worker should be coming here to talk with us.
She was just asking us basic information.
With that done, she was talking on the phone and explaining to someone what I just told her.
``What did she ask?``
``She asked me why I was here.@k@vS12/01/180100661. She told me to wait for a few more minutes.``
``...I hate waiting like this.``
``......Are those posters and advertisements you've been reading that interesting, Mii?``
``'If you see or hear about any problems in someones life, please let us know.'@k@vS12/03/180300332. I guess we came to the right place.``
``Maebara-sama.@k@vS12/00/jimuA18008. Thank you for waiting.@k@vS12/00/jimuA18009. Please go to room number two.``
``It's our turn now!@k@vS12/01/180100665. Let's go!``
As we walked, we soon saw rooms numbered one through three.
Room number two.@k It's this one.
As I knocked, I heard the voice of a man telling me to come in.
``Hello...``
It was a very small room.
Well, I should say it was narrow.@k It wasn't wide, but it was very long.
There was a counter in the middle, which split the room into two.
The man was sitting on the other side of the counter.@k He told us to take a seat, but there were only two chairs...
I sat down, since we registered under my name.
Mion wouldn't sit because she felt that the Sonozaki sisters shouldn't be in the front.
Rena tried to offer the seat to Rika-chan, but she refused, too, so Rena ended up taking it.
It was such a tiny room that it was better for us to take a seat.@k It was very cramped with the five of us.
``I'm sorry.@k@vS12/00/181200002. We usually expect to see the parents, so we only have two chairs.``
I understand that.
``So, how may I help you today?``
The counselor broke his phase in a familiar manner and began to speak, unfolding his notebook.
In response, I spoke on behalf of everyone and explained Satoko's current situation and what to expect.
I chose my words carefully and spoke in detail with Rena and Mion.

During the course of the meeting, there were many times when Shion became frustrated and lost her temper, but thanks to the other two interceding each time, she was able to convey the bare minimum of what she had prepared.
Still... the situation was not as sweet as it could have been.
Of course. We're obviously outsiders. And we're all children. No matter how grown up we tried to be, no matter how much we tried to justify it, it was a hard fact.
And sadly, the more we put our heart and soul into our words, the more we fear for Satoko's safety, the more we realize how poorly we can stand up to the ``logic of adults``.
And what all of us got out of it, after spending quite a bit of time, was not even a grain of understanding.
Yes. It was a feeling of helplessness... blocked by the high wall of reality.
``I understand your concerns.@k@vS12/00/181200036. Thank you very much for sharing your valuable time with us today.``
We were still in Okinomiya.
We were in the city park, devoid of playing children, staring vacantly up at the madder red sky, in silence.
``...I feel like they didn't really listen to our story.``

``But they also didn't try to kick us out.@k@vS12/02/180200401. He's probably just a person who deals with complaints, not the actual social worker that deals with Satoko-chan.@k@vS12/02/180200402. That's why he was phrasing everything the way he did.``
``What did you think about the whole thing, Mion?``
``Well......@k@vS12/03/180300357. It felt like we were wrestling with a tree.@k@vS12/03/180300358. We didn't get pushed or pulled...``
``It was same as talking to a wall...!``

``That's not true.@k@vS12/02/180200404. He said they will forward our information to the social worker.@k@vS12/02/180200405. Like I said, he doesn't know Satoko-chan in person, so he didn't really have any stake in it himself.``
``So you think we accomplished something today, Rena?``
``I don't think it was a waste of time.
But I don't think our passion will be understood by the actual person who is working on the case.
It's so difficult to tell them how passionate we are...@k@vS12/02/180200410. They might treat us coldly if they took our passion for simple anger...``
``I thought you were used to talking with government officials, Mion.@k@vS12/01/180100699. Can't you talk to them instead of me?``
``It's not that she's good at talking.@k@vS12/06/180600224. They just listen to her because she is Mion Sonozaki.@k@vS12/06/180600225. You saw how they treated us today...
If she announced herself as a Sonozaki, we wouldn't have been in such a small room. We would've been speaking to the manager in a reception room.@k@vS12/06/180600227. Right?``
Mion gave a vague smile and didn't comment.
Mion's greatest weapon is her family name.
Without that weapon, she's just as ordinary as the rest of us...
I shouldn't be thinking about this... but if the Sonozaki family forgave Satoko's family, it would be really easy for them to save her.
``So... the Sonozaki family still hates the Houjou family...?``
``No one has publicly stated that we hate them.@k@vS12/03/180300364. ......But... it runs pretty deep...``

``That hag of a grandmother is the one who hates the Houjou family.@k@vS12/06/180600229. Her opinion hasn't changed since we were in the middle of the dam conflict.@k@vS12/06/180600230. It's been so many years, but she still can't let go of the past!``
``Stop it, Shii-chan.@k@vS12/02/180200412. Satoko-chan is Satoko-chan.@k@vS12/02/180200413. She's our precious friend!@k@vS12/02/180200414. It doesn't matter what her last name is!``
Shion went quiet, and there was silence for a while.
...Rena was right.
Just like how Satoko's last name doesn't matter, it doesn't matter what Mion's last name is, either...
The important thing is that our friend is being abused, right now.
We'd have to do everything we can to save her from that situation.
We all looked up at the sky as we listened to the sound of cars passing by.
...We all felt hopeless.@k We had no idea what to do...
Was what we did today going to help Satoko at all?
It would've been better if they just kicked us out.@k That way, we could've been angry with them.
But after being treated politely like that, we had no choice but to back off and see what they were going to do.
We were forced to just wait and see what happens...
Everyone was trying to figure out what our next option was.
I couldn't expect Chie-sensei to tell us that everything was taken care of at the board of education...@k That would be too good to be true...
``What shall we do next...?``
I muttered to myself, hoping that someone would respond with a good idea... but the silence reminded me that everyone was just as stuck as me...
``Rika-chan.@k@vS12/01/180100702. .........I'm sorry.@k@vS12/01/180100703. I was running my mouth off... but I have no idea what to do now...``
``......I don't believe this.``
As I looked at her, I realized the expression on her face was stronger than ever.
``You told Shion yesterday...@k@vS12/05/180500636. You didn't have a good idea at that moment... but you said you would figure out something. You told her to trust you.
So I ......trusted you...@k@vS12/05/180500638. I'm not going to believe it... I'm not going to believe that you would even mention that you have no idea... I'm not going to believe that...``
I could see tears in her eyes.
Rika-chan was sure that I could do something about the situation.
``You said it...@k@vS12/05/180500640. You said that fate is as fragile as a thin piece of paper.@k@vS12/05/180500641. I'm going to believe your words.@k@vS12/05/180500642. I still believe you.
Because... you can easily defeat fate...@k@vS12/05/180500644. So... please help...@k@vS12/05/180500645. Help us escape from this fate.@k@vS12/05/180500646. Help Satoko... ...help her...``
A tear rolled down from the corner of her eye...@k My heart was feeling the same way.
Damn it, damn it, damn it...!!
An innocent girl was becoming a prisoner of a tragic fate.
She desperately needed help...!
I told them that they could trust me.
In other words, that they could count on me.
That they could bet on me.
Betting is not an easy thing.
If I lost, they'd lose their coins too.
What does it mean to trust someone?
It's about making a bet on that person.@k It's about betting a coin.@k It's about betting hope.
Trusting someone is tantamount to placing your hopes in them...
I told Shion yesterday.@k I told her to trust me.
I didn't say it just because.
I knew that those words meant something very serious...
But now, after betraying Rika-chan and seeing her tears, I finally realized just how serious it is...
I look at Shion...
She was in a rage again.
Mion tried to calm her down, but she didn't have any ideas either.
How about Rena...?@k She's always very reliable in a situation like this...
I expected to see her strength...
...However... Rena also looked depressed.
We didn't even know if what we did was a meaningful thing...
Rena looked down with a devastated expression on her face, since she couldn't come up with another option either...
Damn it... I have to do something for them.
Rena's blue fire will melt iron.
Mion can be strong when the wind is in our favor.
Shion is the same way.
They will move forward strongly when the wind is backing them up, but they grow weak when the wind is blowing against them.
Despite the whole situation...@k Rika-chan still believes in us...
She believes that we can do something if we all come together...
That's right. We all agreed.
We said to each other that we could make a miracle happen if we all worked together...
What am I...?
If Rena is the blue fire, I'm the red fire.
I burn brightly and give strength to everyone.
...That's right... I'm Keiichi Maebara...
I'm the magician of words...
I have to motivate everyone.
The blue fire won't light up unless the red fire does too.
When the fire is lit, there will be wind. Mion and Shion will become stronger too!
``Thank you...@k@vS12/01/180100706. You just made me realize something, Rika-chan......@k@vS12/01/180100707. Now the flames inside me are really starting to blaze...!``
``Keiichi...``
We can't give up now!
...We're members of the strongest club ever.@k Nothing can stop us when we get together!

``.........I can't become depressed over a small thing like this...@k@vS12/01/180100709. Rika-chan woke me up......@k@vS12/01/180100710. I just realized how serious it is to have people trust in me.``
Rika-chan knew our personalities well, and she figured out just who she should motivate first.@k ...Whoa, I'm really starting to burn up...
``Hey Mion!@k@vS12/01/180100712. Stop being depressed!@k@vS12/01/180100713. This is where we're supposed to get angry, man!``
Everyone looked at me with wide eyes as they turned at my powerful voice.
They were both surprised by my sudden shout...@k and waiting in anticipation at the vigor of my call.
More and more clearly, I could see it.
...This was Keiichi Maebara's role in this club!

``I don't think we did anything at the child consultation center.@k@vS12/01/180100715. Just like Rena was saying, they're just going to forward a small note saying that the five of us made a visitation.
......But being treated like that has lit the fires of our anger...!``
``Y-You're right, it feels like they gave us the cold shoulder...``
``We were trying to get them to realize how much danger Satoko is in!@k@vS12/01/180100718. We have to fight now!@k@vS12/01/180100719. We have no time to be sitting all depressed in the park!``
``But Keiichi-kun...@k@vS12/02/180200416. What are we supposed to do next...?``

``Heh heh heh!@k@vS12/01/180100721. Don't tell me that you think we have no more options left?!@k@vS12/01/180100722. If this was a club activity, you guys would be losing right now!@k@vS12/01/180100723. Heh heh heh!``
...Heh, this is fun!
I was feeling depressed too, but now I've got a burning passion in my heart.
I felt like I was cheering myself up.
Why was I being so sad?
If I wanted to save Satoko, I had no time to rest!!
This was like the final seconds of the last round in a boxing match where we were at a disadvantage.
If I stand here stupefied, I'll lose by indecision. So the only option is to press the attack!!

Was I supposed to give up just because I couldn't knock out the opponent with one punch?@k No!@k If I couldn't take him out in one, I'd have to throw two or three punches!!@k I'd have to try until I could finally knock him out!!
``You're saying that we're going to go there tomorrow...?``
``Close, but not exactly.@k@vS12/01/180100725. Heh heh heh!``
``I... I have no idea what's on your mind... heh heh heh.
But it sounds very interesting.@k@vS12/03/180300368. ...It isn't like our club to cry ourselves to sleep.@k@vS12/03/180300369. We need to turn this headwind around!``
Yes! Mion is getting her willpower back too...!
``That's right. I agree with Keiichi-kun.@k@vS12/02/180200418. I'm ashamed that I was so depressed.@k@vS12/02/180200419. Let's fight!``
``But what exactly are you trying to do?``
``Heh heh heh...@k@vS12/01/180100727. Remember everyone...@k@vS12/01/180100728. That man really pissed us off today, but he also told us what our next option is.
He never thought he was giving us a hint.@k@vS12/01/180100730. He made a huge mistake.@k@vS12/01/180100731. ......On top of that, that next option is something that I'm really good at...!!``
